enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ore Manam'?

'Ore Manam' conveys deep emotions of love and connection, emphasizing the beauty of togetherness.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Villain'?

In Villain, the song reflects the romantic journey of the lead characters, highlighting their emotional bond.

Who are the singers of 'Ore Manam'?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharan and Nithyashree.

Who composed the music for 'Ore Manam'?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by Vidyasagar.

When was 'Ore Manam' released?

'Ore Manam' was released on November 4, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Villain, the song Ore Manam serves as a heartfelt expression of love between the protagonists. The soothing melody, combined with the poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. It beautifully captures the essence of romantic moments, making it a perfect backdrop for weddings and celebrations. The collaboration of Hariharan and Nithyashree adds a unique charm, making this song a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ore Manam from the movie Villain is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Nithyashree, this song transports listeners to a realm of romantic bliss. The enchanting lyrics by Vairamuthu paired with Vidyasagar's melodious composition make it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: One heart, one quality, one place, happiness, happiness. This is the state, this is the art, this is the story, this is the place, this is the day, this is the love. This is the place of love.
One heart, one quality, one place, happiness, happiness.
On the day of the festival, I was born as a girl, and on the day of the season, I woke up as a face.
I was caught in the gaze of her charm, and I bloomed like a flower with her touch.
Oh flower, I will make your beauty shine with all my heart.
I will give you sweet experiences that will change you.
Even as a girl, I will bring you under the charm of flowers and enjoy.
One heart, one quality, one place, happiness, happiness.
This is the state, this is the art, this is the story, this is the place.
Like the shadow of a garland, I came to wander in the shade of my heart, driven by the desire to serve.
In the body, the joy that sleeps will rise, searching and filling all the cells with honey.
It is your duty to protect my heart's desires, which are like fire within.
One heart, one quality, one place, happiness, happiness. This is the state, this is the art, this is the story, this is the place, this is the day, this is the love. This is the place of love.
